            USER STORY:
            As a restaurant manager, I want to create, monitor and delegate tasks to workers to increase labor management efficiency.

            SEQUENCE DIAGRAM (PlantUML):

participant Worker

TaskManager --> Manager: Task created successfully

activate Manager

TaskManager --> Manager: Display task status

deactivate Manager
